goals: Store a preference about Instagram paid promotion strategy for future reference
Search for previously stored preferences about social media promotion approaches
Review all stored memories to verify what has been remembered
Remove outdated promotion-related memories that are no longer relevant

user_agent_config.personality: Growth-focused and strategic. Prefers practical tips over theoretical advice, and values efficiency in managing social media workflows.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands Instagram promotion mechanics and engagement strategies but has no knowledge of mem0 tool names or internal memory APIs. Treats the assistant as a helpful contact who can remember things for them.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a preference, searched for it, reviewed their memory collection, and cleaned up any outdated entries related to their Instagram promotion strategy.
